CISCO_HOST.description: IP or hostname of the Cisco SG-300 switch

CISCO_ENABLE_PASSWORD.description: Enable password for privileged EXEC mode (if configured)

CISCO_SNMP_COMMUNITY.description: SNMP v2c community string for monitoring (default: public)

CISCO_WRITE_ENABLED.description: Set to "true" to enable write operations (default: false)

CISCO_VERIFY_SSH_HOST_KEY.description: Set to "false" to skip SSH host key verification (default: true)
